name: kb-skills-bioinformatics
description: A literature-review and method-evaluation workflow for bioinformatics, shipped as Claude and Codex skills.

interface.shortDescription: Build method knowledge bases and project analysis plans from bioinformatics literature.
interface.longDescription: Codex adapters for the kb-skills-bioinformatics workflow. Use them to build a reusable method knowledge base, mine project literature, evaluate method fit, and produce analysis plans while preserving the same workflow outputs as the Claude skills.
